title: ursinia pilifera
intro: Ursinia pilifera, also known as the golden daisy or African daisy, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive problems. Ursinia pilifera can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
